title: epipactis helleborine var. lancifolia
intro: Epipactis helleborine var. lancifolia, also known as the Helleborine orchid, is a rare and unique variety of orchid that belongs to the Epipactis genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against infections and skin irritations. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine var. lancifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
